channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Supreme Court hollows out a landmark law that had protected minority voting rights for 6 decades
item.description: The Voting Rights Act over its six decades became one of the most consequential laws in the nation’s history, preventing discrimination against minorities at the ballot box and helping to elect thousands of Black and Hispanic representatives at all levels of government.

item.title: The Black Caucus is the ‘conscience of Congress.’ Supreme Court ruling has it bracing for a big hit
Exonerees struggle to rebuild their lives and gain lasting employment, even if elected to office
